user_query: I am a real estate agent looking for property listings in San Jose, California. Can you provide me with the latest Realtor Property List? I need the list price, address, city, state, and photos of the properties. Additionally, include the agent details and office name for each property.

TaskList.description: Query the latest property listings for San Jose, California.
Extract details such as list price, address, city, state, and photos from the property listings retrieved in Step 1.
Gather agent details and office name for each property from the listings obtained in Step 1.
Compile and format all the extracted information into a cohesive property report.
